title: Initialize Project
description: Detect project languages, frameworks, and risk profile. Creates .the-one/ state directory.

title: Refresh Project
description: Re-fingerprint project files and refresh profile if changed.

title: Search Memory
description: Semantic search across all indexed project documentation.

title: Create Document
description: Create a new managed markdown document. Persists knowledge across sessions.

title: Get Document
description: Retrieve the full content of a managed or external document.

title: List Documents
description: List all indexed documentation files with sizes and timestamps.

title: Update Document
description: Update an existing managed markdown document.

title: Delete Document
description: Soft-delete a document to trash. Recoverable via docs.trash.restore.

title: Get Document Section
description: Extract a specific section from a document by heading name.

title: Reindex Documents
description: Force full re-ingestion of all documents into the RAG index.

title: Suggest Tools
description: Get capability suggestions matching a natural-language query.

title: Run Tool
description: Execute a tool action with policy-gated approval.

title: Export Config
description: Export the current project configuration including limits.

title: Metrics Snapshot
description: View broker metrics: call counts, router stats, provider health.

title: Audit Events
description: Query the audit trail of recent tool executions.
